analysis_commentary: Mixed result. illegal_mass_min hit 0.3997 (better than baseline 0.4944 — a new low under this config) but final illegal_mass rose back to 0.6146 (worse than baseline 0.4953). above_uniform peak only 2 (vs baseline 5). max_prob peaked at 0.42 (vs 0.29) then settled 0.18. Arena duration halved as designed (96s vs 255s). Interpretation: the shorter arena lets the network reach a better transient state but the sustained learning signal is weaker — possibly because the ratio-spike perturbation is also briefer. Neutral: one axis improved, others regressed. Not adopting.
